title: Easy Multiplication Using Grid
author: Saliga, Larry
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This educational innovation addresses the challenges students face in understanding multiplication by introducing a visual aid called the Multiplication Grid. Research shows that difficulties in grasping basic mathematical concepts like multiplication persist among many students, impacting their overall academic performance. The Multiplication Grid provides a structured and visual method to help students internalize multiplication concepts by breaking down the process into manageable steps. This approach aligns with the Department of Education's goals of enhancing teaching methods and making learning more accessible and effective for all students. The grid helps students visualize and understand multiplication operations by using tally marks and patterns, thus reducing confusion and promoting a deeper understanding of the subject. The implementation involves a systematic process where students' needs are assessed, appropriate activities are assigned, and continuous support is provided to ensure comprehension and progress. This method has proven to improve students' multiplication skills, leading to increased confidence and academic achievement.
